title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Nami, Katakuri, Capone Bege, Big Mom, Luffy, Jinbe as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Big mom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is currently confused as to what to be most mad about!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's show her that broken photo once more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Okay! If you say so!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oi! No way that's gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UGeH! That guy from earlier's coming this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Dog- tooth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Right on! Keep going!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This plan is going to work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dogtooth's gone white as a sheet! Which means...

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: He's seen a completely horrific future!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JINBE! Pedro! Back up the straw hats with everything you've got!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Allied forces! Equip "Invisible Sinfonia!"

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: bege...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What'd he just scream out? That bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Should be easy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: HYUP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: INVIBIBI... SINPHONY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The ear- plugs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You think you'll make it in time?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That is the only shot we have

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At getting rid of all these dudes holding guns at their heads!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege! shoot straw hat to death right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I refuse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: All you can do is

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: See a bit into the future.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay! All I gotta do is show this thing to her and the plan'll be back on track!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But it doesn't matter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Cause everyone has the same power

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: He smiles amidst the carnage! Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: to change it!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 32 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
